extracted.title: SESH Pipeline Conditions for 01/27/2026
extracted.description:
For Gas Day January 27, 2026, Southeast Supply Header (SESH) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to SESH's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding SESH's operational capacity:

Restricted Locations:
- Gwinville (IT restricted 19%)
- Gwinville East (IT restricted 63%)

OFO / Imbalance Notice:
- Customer Specific OFO: No DP - Customer Specific issued 1/25/26. 500 Dth / 2% Tolerance
- Imbalances Warnings: No DP - System Wide

SESH has limited operational flexibility to manage imbalances. As a result, SESH requires all delivery point operators to keep actual daily takes out of the system equal to or less than scheduled quantities regardless of their cumulative imbalance position unless otherwise coordinated with your operations account representative.

Customers are advised that capacity may become available as the nomination and confirmation process continues throughout the day.

Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.
